summary_en: Asahimatsu Foods completed buyback of 41,000 shares (2.2% of outstanding) for ¥92.1M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Exchange Transaction (ToSTNeT-3) and Termination of Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Asahimatsu Foods Co., Ltd. announced on May 18, 2026 the completion of treasury stock acquisition. The company purchased 41,000 shares of its own common stock on May 18, 2026 via Tokyo Stock Exchange's ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange transaction method. The acquisition represents 2.2% of outstanding shares (excluding treasury stock) and was executed at a total cost of ¥92,086,000. The board of directors approved the acquisition on May 15, 2026 with an upper limit of 45,000 shares (2.4% of outstanding) and ¥101,070,000. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and implement flexible capital policy responsive to changes in the business environment. This acquisition program has now been completed.
